NMC.Title: Nik's Movement Control
NMC.NormalMovementLimited: Movement is currently restricted by the GM.
NMC.CombatTurnMovementLimited: Movement is restricted to the active combatant's turn.
NMC.Settings.NotifyOnChange.Name: Notify on Movement Change
NMC.Settings.NotifyOnChange.Hint: Display a notification to players when the movement mode changes.
NMC.Settings.MovementOnCombatStart.Name: Movement on Combat Start
NMC.Settings.MovementOnCombatStart.Hint: Automatically set the movement mode when combat starts.
NMC.Settings.MovementOnCombatEnd.Name: Movement on Combat End
NMC.Settings.MovementOnCombatEnd.Hint: Automatically set the movement mode when combat ends.
NMC.Settings.AllowOwnedCombat.Name: Allow Owned Tokens in Combat Turn
NMC.Settings.AllowOwnedCombat.Hint: When in Combat Turn mode, allow all tokens owned by the same player(s) as the active combatant to move (e.g. familiars, mounts).
NMC.Settings.DefaultMovement.Name: Default Movement on Load
NMC.Settings.DefaultMovement.Hint: The movement mode to set when the world is first loaded.
